'''vozhajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwaai|kwaai]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwaai|kwaai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozhajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhajithi|vozhajithi]] || [[word:vozhajiji|vozhajiji]] || [[word:vozhajishi|vozhajishi]] || [[word:vozhajiki|vozhajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhajuthuthu|vozhajuthuthu]] || [[word:vozhajujuju|vozhajujuju]] || [[word:vozhajushushu|vozhajushushu]] || [[word:vozhajukuku|vozhajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhajuthu|vozhajuthu]] || [[word:vozhajuju|vozhajuju]] || [[word:vozhajushu|vozhajushu]] || [[word:vozhajuku|vozhajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhajufthuf|vozhajufthuf]] || [[word:vozhajufjuf|vozhajufjuf]] || [[word:vozhajufshuf|vozhajufshuf]] || [[word:vozhajufkuf|vozhajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhajethe|vozhajethe]] || [[word:vozhajeje|vozhajeje]] || [[word:vozhajeshe|vozhajeshe]] || [[word:vozhajeke|vozhajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhajothotho|vozhajothotho]] || [[word:vozhajojojo|vozhajojojo]] || [[word:vozhajoshosho|vozhajoshosho]] || [[word:vozhajokoko|vozhajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhajotho|vozhajotho]] || [[word:vozhajojo|vozhajojo]] || [[word:vozhajosho|vozhajosho]] || [[word:vozhajoko|vozhajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhajofthof|vozhajofthof]] || [[word:vozhajofjof|vozhajofjof]] || [[word:vozhajofshof|vozhajofshof]] || [[word:vozhajofkof|vozhajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfthĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfjĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfshĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfkĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfthĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfjĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfshĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfkĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfthĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfjĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfshĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:vozhajĂŻfkĂŻf|vozhajĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhajĂŠthĂŠ|vozhajĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:vozhajĂŠjĂŠ|vozhajĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:vozhajĂŠshĂŠ|vozhajĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:vozhajĂŠkĂŠ|vozhajĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhajathatha|vozhajathatha]] || [[word:vozhajajaja|vozhajajaja]] || [[word:vozhajashasha|vozhajashasha]] || [[word:vozhajakaka|vozhajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhajatha|vozhajatha]] || [[word:vozhajaja|vozhajaja]] || [[word:vozhajasha|vozhajasha]] || [[word:vozhajaka|vozhajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhajafthaf|vozhajafthaf]] || [[word:vozhajafjaf|vozhajafjaf]] || [[word:vozhajafshaf|vozhajafshaf]] || [[word:vozhajafkaf|vozhajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vozhajasha|vozhajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozhajshĂ«asha|vozhajshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozhajroasha|vozhajroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozhajmuasha|vozhajmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozhajyaasha|vozhajyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozhajnkshĂ«asha|govozhajnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozhajnkroasha|govozhajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozhajnkmuasha|govozhajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozhajnkyaasha|govozhajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vozhazhajasha|vozhazhajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozhazhajshĂ«asha|vozhazhajshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozhazhajroasha|vozhazhajroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozhazhajmuasha|vozhazhajmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozhazhajyaasha|vozhazhajyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozhazhajnkshĂ«asha|govozhazhajnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozhazhajnkroasha|govozhazhajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozhazhajnkmuasha|govozhazhajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozhazhajnkyaasha|govozhazhajnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vezhĂŠjasha|vezhĂŠjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vezhĂŠjshĂ«asha|vezhĂŠjshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vezhĂŠjroasha|vezhĂŠjroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vezhĂŠjmuasha|vezhĂŠjmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vezhĂŠjyaasha|vezhĂŠjyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govezhĂŠjnkshĂ«asha|govezhĂŠjnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govezhĂŠjnkroasha|govezhĂŠjnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govezhĂŠjnkmuasha|govezhĂŠjnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govezhĂŠjnkyaasha|govezhĂŠjnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vozhfajasha|vozhfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozhfajshĂ«asha|vozhfajshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozhfajroasha|vozhfajroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozhfajmuasha|vozhfajmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozhfajyaasha|vozhfajyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozhfajnkshĂ«asha|govozhfajnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozhfajnkroasha|govozhfajnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozhfajnkmuasha|govozhfajnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozhfajnkyaasha|govozhfajnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
